text: Everyone stand up and do 10 jumping jacks together. Ready? Go!
Strike your best superhero pose and hold it for 5 seconds. Channel your inner power!
Do a group wave around the room — start left, end right. Make it smooth!
Everyone spin around once, then give each other a high-five.
Do your best impression of a famous athlete or superhero for 10 seconds.
Walk to the front of the room, bow, and walk back. Own it!
Everyone stand on one foot for 15 seconds while cheering for each other.
Form a human chain and do a synchronized dance move. Whatever feels right!
Everyone touch the floor, reach for the sky, and clap. Repeat three times!
Do your best robot dance for 10 seconds. Beep boop!
What skill do you have that would surprise your colleagues?
If your team were a famous band, what would you be called and why?
Describe your current project using only movie titles. Go!
What's the best advice you've ever received, and who gave it to you?
If you could add one feature to your job, what would it be?
What's something you learned this week that surprised you?
What's your ideal innovation: time, money, or team? Why?
Finish this sentence: "The best ideas come from..."
What was your first job, and what did it teach you?
If you could work on any project with anyone, what would it be?
Sketch the logo for a startup that solves your biggest work frustration. You have 60 seconds!
Write a 6-word story about innovation. Make it memorable!
In 30 seconds, name as many uses for a paperclip as possible. Go!
Create a rap or poetry about your company in 45 seconds. No rhyming required!
Design a new office snack in 60 seconds. What's it called? What does it taste like?
Invent a new holiday that celebrates your team. What's it called? How do you celebrate?
Create a haiku about teamwork using only one-syllable words. You have 60 seconds.
Design a new emoji that represents your team's vibe. Draw or describe it!
Write a job posting for the role you wish existed. Make it funny!
Create a new word that describes the feeling of a great idea. What's it called?
Your team gets to make up a new rule for the rest of the game. What is it?
Swap one team member with another team for the next round. Choose wisely!
Everyone shout out their favorite emoji at the same time!
The entire room must do your team's favorite dance move together.
Your team gets to ask the room any question and everyone must answer honestly.
